nodes.name: Purple-capped fruit dove
nodes.summary: The purple-capped fruit dove or Pohnpei fruit dove (Ptilinopus ponapensis), is a species of bird in the family Columbidae found on Chuuk and Pohnpei in the Caroline Islands. It was formerly considered as a subspecies of the crimson-crowned fruit dove. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests and subtropical or tropical mangrove forests. References Cibois, A., J.-C. Thibault, C. Bonillo, C.E. Filardi, D. Watling, and E. Pasquet. 2014. Phylogeny and biogeography of the fruit doves (Aves: Columbidae). Molecular Phylogenetics and Evolution 70: 442–453.

nodes.name: Purple-capped fruit dove
nodes.summary: Purple-capped fruit dove（Ptilinopus ponapensis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Purple-capped fruit dove。

nodes.name: 果鳩屬
nodes.summary: 果鳩屬（Ptilinopus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联52种鸟类，如Scarlet-breasted fruit dove、Wompoo fruit dove、Yellow-breasted fruit dove等52种鸟类。
